name: Fireside Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the brisket with minced garlic and place it on a bed of chopped onions in a roasting pan with a tight-fitting cover.
2. Over the brisket, place the following in this order: pepper, Worcestershire sauce, onion soup mix, chili sauce, and beer.
3. Lay carrots around the brisket and tear bread into small pieces, tucking it under the brisket so that it is covered with liquid.
4. Cover and bake in a preheated 350 degree Fahrenheit oven for one hour.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 275 degrees Fahrenheit and braise another 2 to 2.5 hours or until tender.
6. Remove from the oven and let stand until cool. Remove meat and slice.
7. Arrange meat slices and carrots on an oven-proof platter; cover with foil.
8. To make gravy, take the bread, half the onions, and 2 cups of liquid from the roasting pan. Place in a blender or food processor and process until blended.
9. Return the mixture to the pan and blend with the remaining liquid. About 1/2 hour before serving, reheat meat and carrots with half the gravy.
10. Pour the remainder of the gravy into a gravy boat and pass separately.
